propositions: Bump 8 GitHub Actions to new major versions across the workflow YAML files, landing the change via Gerrit rather than the GitHub PR.
The upgrade tracks the Node 20 to Node 24 runner runtime cutover before GitHub forces Node 24 and removes Node 20.
Seven of the bumps are clean runtime bumps with no input or default changes affecting existing usage.
The actions/checkout v6 change moving persist-credentials creds to $RUNNER_TEMP briefly broke linked-worktree pushes in reconcile-bridge, fixed in v6.0.1+/v7 via a worktrees/* includeIf.
Only files under .github/workflows/ are modified and all changed YAML files must still parse.
CI failures on the change are pre-existing flaky timing tests unrelated to the YAML-only edits, and the change landed merged on main.
